description_long: This church features a grand, elongated rectangular nave with a steeply pitched roof and a prominent central spire rising above the main entrance. The facade is richly detailed, with classical columns, arched windows, and decorative stonework, flanked by two smaller towers capped with pointed spires. The side elevations display a rhythmic series of tall, narrow windows and buttresses, suggesting a traditional ecclesiastical architectural style. The roof is covered in dark slate or tile, contrasting with the light stone or stucco walls. At the front, a large cross is mounted atop the central spire, emphasizing its religious function. The overall structure is imposing and monumental, designed to accommodate a large congregation and serve as a focal point in an urban setting.
description: A grand, stone church with a tall central spire, two smaller flanking towers, and detailed classical facades. The structure features arched windows, buttresses, and a prominent cross atop the main spire.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long nave, steeply pitched roof, and the main spire rising at the far end, with repetitive arched windows and buttresses along the length.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the ornate entrance, central spire with cross, and two smaller side towers with pointed spires.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the extended nave, series of arched windows, and the rear of the main spire, with visible buttresses.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back facade, roofline, and the alignment of the three spires, with less ornamental detail than the front.
